name: CombatMeter
description: Real-time party DPS/HPS meter with role colours.
author: Stellar

added: Party-friendly uploads: when a party member already uploaded your run, your client now sends only a tiny supplement (your own gear/skill detail) instead of the full multi-megabyte upload — the run page still shows everyone's full loadout.
Duplicate-upload courtesy: if your upload turns out to be a duplicate of a party member's, the redundant event-chunk and positions uploads are skipped automatically.
changed: Auto-uploads spread out over a few seconds after a run ends (manual uploads are unchanged) so a full party doesn't hammer the server simultaneously.
